info.title: Payment Guard — pre-send risk check for AI agents that move money
info.description: Before an AI agent sends funds (x402 / crypto / a payment URL), check the recipient: is the address OFAC-sanctioned, on a scam/abuse blocklist, or suspicious (brand-new/unused, a contract)? Vet the payment URL for lookalikes and new domains. Resolve and screen ENS names. Deterministic, no LLM. Free data: OFAC SDN crypto addresses, ethereum-lists + ScamSniffer blocklists, on-chain reads via public RPC, ENS. EVM chains: Ethereum, Base, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism.

get.summary: The pre-send guard: screen a crypto address (or ENS name) for sanctions/scam/on-chain risk

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: EVM address (0x + 40 hex) or ENS name (e.g. name.eth).

get.summary: Risk-check an x402/payment endpoint or merchant URL (lookalikes, new domain, redirects)
Fast OFAC sanctions check for an address or ENS name (no on-chain)
Resolve an ENS name to an address and screen it (catch non-resolving names + spoofs)
